requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs SAE J1772 / CCS1
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与SAE J1772 / CCS1
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與SAE J1772 / CCS1

summary.en: Official Guyana sources reviewed for this dataset did not confirm a single national EV charger connector mandate as of 2026-06-14. In practice, Guyana's 120/240 V, 60 Hz electrical environment and vehicle import patterns place it in the Americas connector ecosystem, where SAE J1772 Type 1 is the common AC conductive charging coupler and CCS Combo 1 is the common DC fast-charging coupler. For any Guyana deployment, the connector must match the vehicles and the site owner's or charge-point operator's specification; exporters should confirm the exact J1772, CCS1, NACS, CHAdeMO, or other outlet requirement with GEA, GNBS, GPL, the vehicle importer, and the project owner before shipment.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，为本数据集审阅的圭亚那官方来源未确认单一全国电动汽车充电接口强制标准。实务上，圭亚那120/240 V、60 Hz电气环境及车辆进口格局使其更接近美洲接口生态，其中SAE J1772 Type 1是常见交流传导充电耦合器，CCS Combo 1是常见直流快充耦合器。任何圭亚那部署的接口必须匹配车辆以及场地方或充电点运营商规范；出口商发货前应向GEA、GNBS、GPL、车辆进口商和项目业主确认具体J1772、CCS1、NACS、CHAdeMO或其他接口要求。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，為本數據集審閱的圭亞那官方來源未確認單一全國電動汽車充電接口強制標準。實務上，圭亞那120/240 V、60 Hz電氣環境及車輛進口格局使其更接近美洲接口生態，其中SAE J1772 Type 1是常見交流傳導充電耦合器，CCS Combo 1是常見直流快充耦合器。任何圭亞那部署的接口必須匹配車輛以及場地方或充電點運營商規範；出口商發貨前應向GEA、GNBS、GPL、車輛進口商和項目業主確認具體J1772、CCS1、NACS、CHAdeMO或其他接口要求。

standards_or_laws: SAE J1772 — Electric Vehicle and Plug in Hybrid Electric Vehicle Conductive Charge Coupler
IEC 62196-2 — Type 1 AC dimensional compatibility and interchangeability context
IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers, including CCS connector families
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 DC communication. GB/T AC and DC connector geometry, contact allocation, vehicle inlet expectations, locking strategy and signalling differ from SAE J1772 Type 1 and CCS Combo 1. A GB/T connector cannot plug into a J1772 / CCS1 vehicle inlet, and a J1772 / CCS1 vehicle cannot use a GB/T outlet without a charger-side hardware and protocol change.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并配合GB/T 27930直流通信。GB/T交流和直流接口在几何形状、触点分配、车辆插座预期、锁止策略和信号方面均不同于SAE J1772 Type 1及CCS Combo 1。GB/T接口无法插入J1772 / CCS1车辆插座，J1772 / CCS1车辆也无法在未进行充电桩侧硬件和协议变更的情况下使用GB/T输出口。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並配合GB/T 27930直流通訊。GB/T交流和直流接口在幾何形狀、觸點分配、車輛插座預期、鎖止策略和信號方面均不同於SAE J1772 Type 1及CCS Combo 1。GB/T接口無法插入J1772 / CCS1車輛插座，J1772 / CCS1車輛也無法在未進行充電樁側硬體和協議變更的情況下使用GB/T輸出口。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for Guyana projects that use J1772 / CCS1. Conversion requires a hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, inlet/outlet lock, proximity and control pilot signalling, DC communication stack, labels, test reports, thermal rise evidence, and spare-part strategy. Because the exact Guyana connector requirement is not confirmed as a national rule, the compliant path is to confirm the project connector with GEA/GNBS/GPL and the CPO, then build the charger to that connector rather than relying on adapters.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩，不适用于采用J1772 / CCS1的圭亚那项目。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、车辆插座/输出口锁止、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈、标签、测试报告、温升证据及备件策略进行硬件重新设计。由于圭亚那接口要求尚未确认存在全国规则，合规路径是向GEA/GNBS/GPL和充电点运营商确认项目接口，然后按该接口制造充电桩，而不是依赖转接器。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁，不適用於採用J1772 / CCS1的圭亞那項目。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、車輛插座/輸出口鎖止、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧、標籤、測試報告、溫升證據及備件策略進行硬體重新設計。由於圭亞那接口要求尚未確認存在全國規則，合規路徑是向GEA/GNBS/GPL和充電點運營商確認項目接口，然後按該接口製造充電樁，而不是依賴轉接器。

mandatory_status.target: Project-mandatory where J1772 / CCS1 or another connector is specified by the site owner, CPO, vehicle fleet, tender, or utility coordination process; national connector mandate not confirmed from official Guyana sources
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not a J1772 / CCS1 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. Assume GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with J1772 / CCS1 vehicles, and confirm the exact Guyana connector requirement with GEA/GNBS before quoting or shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。应假定GB/T接口与J1772 / CCS1车辆物理不兼容，并在报价或发货前向GEA/GNBS确认圭亚那具体接口要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。應假定GB/T接口與J1772 / CCS1車輛物理不兼容，並在報價或發貨前向GEA/GNBS確認圭亞那具體接口要求。
